title: Regulator's notification 04-2025: top venting blank firers
body: "This notification provides guidelines for practitioners examining and reporting on imitation firearms which may be readily convertible into firearms.  The notification covers:   the regulator’s consideration of the inclusion of the assessment of convertibility as a Forensic Science Activity (FSA) in a future version of the code of practice interim guidelines for practitioners examining and reporting on imitation firearms which may be readily convertible into firearms  "
